name: assert-contracts-not-incidental-platform-strings
brief: Verification should target the real platform contract rather than brittle wording or environment-specific text

name: cross-module-features-need-contract-tests
brief: Features that span app, ui, config, main, and launch must be verified at the shared contract boundaries

name: hotkey-ui-changes-must-be-discoverable
brief: Any new interactive key path must update the visible UI hints and ship with coverage for discoverability

name: kiss
brief: Make Both Design Decision and Code Style As Simple/Stupid As Possible

name: mask-secrets-on-every-display-path
brief: Any user-visible rendering of secret-like config values must apply the shared masking policy

name: preserve-user-edited-config-structure
brief: Mutations to user config should preserve comments, formatting, and ordering whenever possible

name: pure-builders-thin-effectful-edges
brief: Keep data shaping pure and isolate I/O, env mutation, terminal changes, and exec in narrow wrappers

name: single-source-of-truth-variant-mappings
brief: Runtime-discriminated field/index mappings must be owned by one authoritative function

name: test-boundaries-with-stubs-before-manual-verification
brief: External integrations should be made deterministic under test before relying on manual verification
